text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I made it through the Takarazuka<n>Kinen... and
Opera O and Doto were<n>both more precious than
ever!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After the race, the two declare their<n>rivalry. A
feeling I can't describe<n>wells up within me—but I
can't tell if<n>the heat comes from this fateful
moment or something... else.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's only one way to find out,<n>though. By
running more races! Stay<n>tuned next episode for
the Japan Dirt<n>Derby!
